examples: The house adjacent to the church is the vicarage.
It was impossible to think of returning to the Vicarage.
I'll now call at the vicarage and report to you in due course.
Mr Suddards, 59, was found dead at his vicarage in Thornbury, near Bristol, in February.
The 38-year-old former Watford boss has been out of work since leaving Vicarage Road last November.
